prompt: Based only on the representation above: which entity has the highest number of incoming dependencies (in-degree)? Respond with JSON only, exactly in this shape: {"answer": "name"}. No prose, no markdown fences.

Based only on the representation above: list every entity that participates in at least one circular dependency. Respond with JSON only, exactly in this shape: {"answer": ["name1", "name2"]}. Use an empty array if nothing qualifies. No prose, no markdown fences.

Based only on the representation above: if the signature of method Pf3.m4 changes, which methods are directly impacted (they call it directly)? Respond with JSON only, exactly in this shape: {"answer": ["name1", "name2"]}. Use an empty array if nothing qualifies. No prose, no markdown fences.

Based only on the representation above: which method is called by the largest number of distinct other methods? Respond with JSON only, exactly in this shape: {"answer": "name"}. No prose, no markdown fences.
